overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a science fiction video game showing a character exploring a dimly lit industrial facility or space station. The character moves through metal corridors and warehouse areas with industrial architecture, passing from a maintenance bay through a narrow corridor with red security doors into a larger hangar-like space.

events.description: character stops walking and looks upward toward the upper catwalk level

agents.ego_description: walking through the maintenance area, pausing to look up at the upper level catwalks and industrial structures

elevated metal walkway with safety railings spanning the upper level

thick black cables running across the floor and walls

segments.scene_description: The character explores a dimly lit industrial maintenance bay with metal staircases and catwalks. A seated NPC rests against the far wall. The character walks past tall metal shelving units and pauses to look up at the upper level before continuing.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow security corridor with large red industrial doors

events.description: character enters narrow corridor with large red industrial security doors
lighting brightens slightly as character approaches the warehouse exit ahead

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the narrow corridor toward the large warehouse space ahead

entered.detail: massive red metal security doors with hydraulic arms mounted on corridor walls
dark metal corridor walls with industrial paneling and piping

segments.scene_description: The character moves from the open maintenance bay into a narrow enclosed corridor flanked by massive red industrial security doors. The space is tight and dimly lit, with the character walking toward a brighter opening at the far end leading to a larger space.

scene_state.functional_zone: large warehouse hangar with support pillars and overhead lighting

events.description: character exits narrow corridor into large open warehouse or hangar bay
character slightly turns while walking to survey the warehouse interior

agents.ego_description: walking through the spacious warehouse, observing the surroundings and heading toward the far exit

notable_agents.action: figure in green uniform standing near an office window, observing the area

entered.detail: large cylindrical concrete support pillars with blue painted bases
long fluorescent light fixtures hanging from the high warehouse ceiling
illuminated green exit sign above a doorway
large glass window of an office or control room embedded in the warehouse wall
white painted metal staircase leading to an upper level

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the corridor into a vast warehouse hangar with high ceilings, support pillars, and overhead fluorescent lighting. A uniformed NPC stands near an office window on the right. The character walks across the open concrete floor toward a distant exit, passing industrial equipment and staircases.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dimly lit industrial facility that transitions from a cramped maintenance area into a vast, open hangar. It begins in a maintenance bay filled with metal staircases and catwalks, where the camera passes tall shelving units and a seated NPC resting against the wall. As the character moves forward, the open space tightens into a narrow enclosed corridor flanked by massive red security doors, guiding the view toward a bright light at the far end. The scene then expands as the camera emerges from the corridor into a cavernous warehouse hangar characterized by high ceilings, support pillars, and overhead fluorescent lighting. Finally, the camera glides across the open concrete floor past industrial equipment and a uniformed NPC standing by an office window, heading toward a distant exit.
